title: Deep Trouble The Gulf Coast Oil Spill
titleZh: 深海危机：墨西哥湾漏油事件

q.en: When did the Deepwater Horizon explosion happen?
q.zh: “深水地平线”爆炸发生在什么时候？

options.en: 1991 according to some versions of the story

explain.en: The rig exploded on the night of April 20, 2010, 42 miles off Louisiana in the Gulf of Mexico.
explain.zh: 钻井平台于2010年4月20日晚在墨西哥湾路易斯安那州外42英里处爆炸。

q.en: Why did so much oil leak into the Gulf?
q.zh: 为什么会有那么多石油泄漏到海湾？

options.en: The safety valve on the well failed to close
options.zh: 油井的安全阀未能关闭

options.en: A ship crashed into it according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一艘船撞上它（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The well's safety valve failed, so about 60,000 barrels of oil leaked each day until capped.
explain.zh: 油井的安全阀失灵，每天泄漏约6万桶石油，直到被封住。

q.en: About how many barrels of oil had leaked by the time the well was capped?
q.zh: 油井被封住时，大约泄漏了多少桶石油？

options.en: 10 million according to some versions of the story

explain.en: By July 15, when the well was capped from the top, about 5 million barrels had leaked into the Gulf.
explain.zh: 到7月15日从顶部封井时，约500万桶石油已泄漏入海湾。

q.en: Which cleanup method uses long floating tubes to form a barrier?
q.zh: 哪种清理方法用长浮管形成屏障？

options.en: Absorption according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 吸收（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Booms are long floating tubes strung out to stop the oil from spreading before it is skimmed.
explain.zh: 拦油栅是成排的浮管，用于在撇油前阻止油污扩散。

q.en: Which was the worst oil spill ever, created on purpose?
q.zh: 史上最严重、且是人为故意造成的漏油事件是哪次？

options.en: Iraq's 1991 release of oil into the Persian Gulf
options.zh: 1991年伊拉克向波斯湾排放石油

options.en: The Deepwater Horizon spill according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 深水地平线漏油（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: In 1991 Iraqi soldiers released up to 520 million gallons of oil into the Persian Gulf to block enemies, the worst spill ever.
explain.zh: 1991年伊拉克士兵向波斯湾排放多达5.2亿加仑石油以阻挡敌军，是有史以来最严重的漏油。

q.en: About how much damage to fishing and tourism was estimated from this spill?
q.zh: 据估计这次漏油对渔业和旅游业造成多少损失？

options.en: $1 million according to some versions of the story

explain.en: Some estimates put damages to Gulf fishing and tourism from the spill at more than $5 billion.
explain.zh: 一些估计认为漏油对墨西哥湾渔业和旅游业的损失超过50亿美元。

q.en: What finally plugged the leaking well from the bottom?
q.zh: 最终从底部封住漏油井的是什么？

options.en: Relief wells that pumped mud and cement
options.zh: 注入泥浆和水泥的减压井

options.en: Robotic submarines only according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 仅遥控潜艇（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Relief wells reached the original well and pumped mud and cement to seal it shut for good in September 2010.
explain.zh: 减压井连通原井并注入泥浆和水泥，于2010年9月永久封死油井。

q.en: How do chemicals help clean up spilled oil?
q.zh: 化学药剂如何帮助清理漏油？

options.en: They break oil into droplets that sink so bacteria can eat them
options.zh: 把油分解成小滴下沉，供细菌吞食

options.en: They make the oil disappear according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 让石油消失（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Planes drop chemicals that break the oil into tiny droplets, which then sink and are eaten by natural bacteria.
explain.zh: 飞机喷洒化学药剂把油分解成小滴下沉，再由天然细菌吞食。

q.en: What is the offshore drilling debate mainly about?
q.zh: 关于近海钻探的争论主要围绕什么？

options.en: Whether to build more towers according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 是否建造更多塔架（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: The risk of spills versus growing energy needs
options.zh: 漏油风险与日益增长的能源需求之间的权衡

explain.en: Some oppose offshore drilling for its risks, while others say our energy needs make it necessary if safety precautions are taken.
explain.zh: 有人因风险反对近海钻探，也有人认为只要采取预防，能源需求使其必要。

q.en: How many workers died in the initial Deepwater Horizon explosion?
q.zh: “深水地平线”最初的爆炸中有多少工人死亡？

explain.en: Of the 126 workers on the rig, eleven died in the explosion and the others were rescued.
explain.zh: 平台上126名工人中，11人死于爆炸，其余获救。

prompt.en: The book presents both sides of the offshore drilling debate. If your town depended on fishing but a company wanted to drill nearby, what would you decide and why?
prompt.zh: 书中呈现了近海钻探的正反两方。如果你的小镇依赖渔业，却有公司想在附近钻井，你会怎么决定？为什么？

en: Weigh jobs and energy against the risk to ocean life and livelihoods.
Think about what safety measures might change your answer.
zh: 权衡就业和能源与海洋生物及生计的风险。
想想哪些安全措施可能改变你的决定。
